name: ultra11y
description: Audit HTML/CSS/JSX for RGAA 4.1.2 + WCAG 2.1/2.2 AA accessibility and produce a dated compliance report, or author/review accessible markup (native-HTML-first). A skills.sh agent skill: a zero-dependency static engine plus Claude's judgment, with check/verify gates against hallucinated non-conformities.

scripts.check:build: tsup && node scripts/copy-bundle.mjs && git diff --exit-code -- scripts/ultra11y.mjs skills/ultra11y/scripts/ultra11y.mjs
scripts.demo: node scripts/ultra11y.mjs audit tests/fixtures/non-conforming/bad.html --out /tmp/ultra11y-demo --json > /tmp/ultra11y-demo/audit.json && node scripts/ultra11y.mjs report --in /tmp/ultra11y-demo/audit.json --out /tmp/ultra11y-demo && node scripts/ultra11y.mjs criteria --list

author: maxgfr
